mapper.sql: id, order_no, order_type, order_source, customer_id, equipment_id, reporter_name, reporter_phone, fault_description, fault_level, fault_category, assignee_id, assign_time, accept_time, arrive_time, finish_time, confirm_time, order_status, handling_detail, handling_result, charge_amount, is_chargeable, customer_sign, rating, rating_remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_work_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT wo.id, wo.order_no, wo.order_type, CASE wo.order_type WHEN 1 THEN '报修' WHEN 2 THEN '保养' WHEN 3 THEN '安装调试' WHEN 4 THEN '巡检' ELSE '其他' END AS order_type_name, wo.order_status, CASE wo.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '待派单' WHEN 1 THEN '待接单' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' WHEN 3 THEN '待验收' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' WHEN 5 THEN '已关闭' WHEN 6 THEN '已取消' ELSE '未知' END AS order_status_name, eq.equipment_code, eq.equipment_name, cus.customer_name, wo.reporter_name, wo.reporter_phone, wo.fault_description, wo.fault_level, CASE wo.fault_level WHEN 1 THEN '紧急' WHEN 2 THEN '高' WHEN 3 THEN '中' WHEN 4 THEN '低' ELSE '未知' END AS fault_level_name, us.real_name AS assignee_name, wo.assign_time, wo.accept_time, wo.arrive_time, wo.finish_time, wo.handling_detail, wo.rating, wo.create_time FROM tbl_work_order wo LEFT JOIN tbl_equipment eq ON wo.equipment_id = eq.id AND eq.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tbl_customer cus ON wo.customer_id = cus.id AND cus.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tbl_sys_user us ON wo.assignee_id = us.id AND us.deleted = 0 WHERE wo.id = #{id} AND wo.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_work_order ( order_no, order_type, order_source, customer_id, equipment_id, reporter_name, reporter_phone, fault_description, fault_level, fault_category, assignee_id, assign_time, order_status, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{orderSource}, #{customerId}, #{equipmentId}, #{reporterName}, #{reporterPhone}, #{faultDescription}, #{faultLevel}, #{faultCategory}, #{assigneeId}, #{assignTime}, #{orderStatus}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_work_order
update_time = NOW(), reporter_name = #{reporterName}, reporter_phone = #{reporterPhone}, fault_description = #{faultDescription}, fault_level = #{faultLevel}, fault_category = #{faultCategory}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, handling_detail = #{handlingDetail}, handling_result = #{handlingResult}, rating = #{rating}, rating_remark = #{ratingRemark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE tbl_work_order SET order_status = #{newStatus}, update_time = NOW() , accept_time = NOW() , arrive_time = NOW() , finish_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status = #{oldStatus} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_work_order SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT order_no FROM tbl_work_order WHERE order_no LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY order_no DESC LIMIT 1
